scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix client install --include=dev && npm --prefix server install --include=dev
scripts.build:client: npm --prefix client install --include=dev && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.build:server: npm --prefix server install --include=dev && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.lint: npm --prefix client run lint && npm --prefix server run lint
scripts.quality:lint: npm --prefix client run lint && npm --prefix server run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix client run typecheck && npm --prefix server run typecheck
scripts.quality:typecheck: npm --prefix client run typecheck && npm --prefix server run typecheck
scripts.quality:test: npm --prefix client test -- --run && npm --prefix server test
scripts.quality:ci: npm run quality:lint && npm run quality:format:check && npm run quality:typecheck && npm run quality:test
scripts.audit:full: npm run smoke:features && npm run smoke:analyze && npm run smoke:wiring:static && npm run smoke:audit-trace:determinism
